assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting under IFRS 9 in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividends give rise to foreign currency exposure reflected through an intragroup receivable.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of such items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model, including for highly probable forecast transactions and qualifying risk components.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The provided context includes IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 guidance on hedging foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements through the net investment hedge model.
